penalties.description: Video appears to be instructional content rather than a scoreable task performance attempt

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement between models on whether this is a scoreable performance attempt. Claude identified this as instructional content with promotional overlays and no clear timing markers. GPT-4o scored it as a completed task in 175 seconds. Given the fundamental disagreement about video content type and the lack of clear task attempt boundaries, the conservative approach is to treat this as non-scoreable instructional content per Claude's assessment.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's identification of instructional content with promotional overlays takes precedence over GPT's timing assessment when video content type is disputed

claude_value.description: This appears to be an instructional video about intracorporeal suturing techniques rather than a performance attempt

disagreements.rationale: When one model identifies fundamental task completion issues, the conservative approach is to preserve the incomplete_task designation
Score follows from incomplete_task penalty determination
Conservative approach when video content type is disputed - only include phases both models can clearly identify
